name: Machine Learning Core
description: Fundamental algorithms and mathematical concepts behind machine learning, including supervised and unsupervised learning, optimization, and regression models.

name: Sentence Transformers
description: Python framework for state-of-the-art sentence, text and image embeddings. Crucial for semantic search, document matching, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) applications.

name: ChromaDB
description: Open-source AI-native vector database designed to store, manage, and query dense vector embeddings alongside document content and metadata in developer environments.

name: Pandas & NumPy
description: Fundamental python data structures and operations for numerical arrays (NumPy) and structured table manipulation (Pandas).
